scripts.dev: cross-env PROMPT_DEFENSE_DEV=true concurrently -k -n BACKEND,VITE,ELECTRON_TS,ELECTRON "npm run backend" "npm run vite:dev" "tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json --watch" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health dist-electron/main.js && electronmon ."
scripts.electron:start: npm run build && concurrently -k -n BACKEND,ELECTRON "npm run backend" "wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health && electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -b && npm run electron:build && vite build
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:e2e
